caption: The video displays a screen recording of a website from RANDOM.ORG featuring a "List Randomizer" tool. The page contains a numbered list from 1 to 10 in random order, beginning with "1. 7" and ending with "10. 4." Text at the top warns, "Advisory: We only operate services from the RANDOM.ORG domain." A chat overlay on the right shows messages from users "nightbot" and "nogent," with one message stating, "I think if you are a team signing Ohtani, you are going all in on everyone you can." In the lower-right corner, a small webcam feed shows a man with a beard wearing a black baseball cap and a black shirt, appearing in front of a background with "CASEBREAKS.COM" logos. The scene remains static across the frames, with no visible changes in the text, the list order, or the man's posture.
